# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The latest major release on `main` is actively supported. Older tags receive no security updates.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please DO NOT open public issues for security bugs.

Email **security@depscope.dev** (forwards to depscope@cuttalo.com) or follow our [responsible disclosure policy](https://depscope.dev/security/disclosure). You will receive an acknowledgment within 3 business days.

For full details, infrastructure and trust information see https://depscope.dev/security. Our public contact is also available via `/.well-known/security.txt`.
